title: The Divine Woman
writer: John Colton, Dorothy Farnum, Gladys Unger
actors: Greta Garbo, Lars Hanson, Lowell Sherman
plot: Lucian, a soldier in Paris, is to ship out for Algiers at 9 that evening. He stops by for a last meal with his love, Marianne. He may be worried that when he leaves she will find another soldier to love. They argue then embrace an...
